description: Calculate residential space efficiency metrics for San Francisco zones using the Jupyter notebook at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/notebooks/space_efficiency_analysis.ipynb and data from /home/ga/urbansim_projects/data/sanfran_public.h5. Perform a multi-level data aggregation of households, buildings, and parcels to determine the residential square footage per capita (total_residential_sqft / total_persons) for each zone, filtering for residential buildings (residential_units > 0) and treating missing residential square footage as zero. Export a zone-level summary containing zone_id, total_buildings, total_residential_sqft, total_persons, and sqft_per_capita to /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/zone_space_efficiency.csv. Generate a scatter plot of total_persons vs. total_residential_sqft at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/efficiency_scatter.png and a bar chart of the top 10 least efficient zones (highest sqft_per_capita) with at least 50 persons at /home/ga/urbansim_projects/output/least_efficient_zones.png. The notebook must be fully executed with all outputs visible.
